name: User Changed to Low Privilege Role
notes:
This rule removes a username from the reference set Users with High Privilege Role Names if the user is given lower privilege role.

Note: The Low Privilege Role Names reference set must be populated with the relevant role names.  Anything not defined in this Reference Set is considered as suspicious in terms of privileges.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud' AND (LOGSOURCETYPENAME(devicetype) NOT IN ('Microsoft Azure Platform'
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: User Role Assign Events
when any of Role Name (custom) are contained in any of Low Privilege Role Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)

when the event matches ((LOGSOURCETYPENAME(devicetype) IN ('Microsoft Azure Platform','Microsoft Azure Security Center','Microsoft Azure Active Directory')) AND "Object ID" is null) OR ("Rule Name"='BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud' AND (LOGSOURCETYPENAME(devicetype) NOT IN ('Microsoft Azure Platform','Microsoft Azure Security Center','Microsoft Azure Active Directory'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY User Changed to Low Privilege Role on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: User Role Assign Events
AND when any of Role Name (custom) are contained in any of Low Privilege Role Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)

AND when the event matches ((LOGSOURCETYPENAME(devicetype) IN ('Microsoft Azure Platform','Microsoft Azure Security Center','Microsoft Azure Active Directory')) AND "Object ID" is null) OR ("Rule Name"='BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud' AND (LOGSOURCETYPENAME(devicetype) NOT IN ('Microsoft Azure Platform','Microsoft Azure Security Center','Microsoft Azure Active Directory'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Remove "Target Username" from Reference Set: "Users with High Privilege Role Names"
